title: Add inference quality gate: test provider connectivity and prune failing providers

steps.description: Add ProviderHealthCheck port for validating provider connectivity
steps.done_condition: ProviderHealthCheck port is created and tested

steps.description: Add ProviderValidationError domain type for error handling
steps.done_condition: ProviderValidationError type is defined and documented

steps.description: Implement provider-specific validation adapters for each provider type
steps.done_condition: Validation adapters are implemented and unit tested

steps.description: Implement validation logic in hex inference add command
steps.done_condition: CLI command incorporates validation and returns errors for invalid providers

steps.description: Add ValidateProvider usecase to orchestrate provider validation
steps.done_condition: ValidateProvider usecase is implemented and tested

steps.description: Add PruneProviders usecase to handle provider pruning with --prune flag
steps.done_condition: PruneProviders usecase is implemented and tests are passing

steps.description: Integrate usecases with primary adapter (CLI command)
steps.done_condition: Integration wiring between usecases and CLI command is complete

riskRegister.mitigation: Monitor performance and consider async validation for future iterations
riskRegister.risk: Validation may reduce performance of hex inference add command

riskRegister.mitigation: Implement error handling and consider fallback mechanisms
riskRegister.risk: False positives during validation for rate-limited providers

successCriteria: Connectors correctly return errors for invalid providers
CLI supports --prune flag and removes failing providers as expected
Validation logic is fully tested and integrates seamlessly with the existing workflow
